title: 8oz Glass Mortar and Pestle Bowl, Medicine Grinder and Mixer for Pharmacy or Science Lab
description:
About this item
Smooth Surface & Easy to Clean: High-quality glass material to unsure nonporous, non-staining grinding surface, and medicine powders don't usually adhere to the sides
Tested and Improved: Special designed pour spout, sturdy base, large grinding head, comfort grip, all making this and ideal pharmaceutical compounding tool
Easy to use: Maximum visibility and durable glass material to crush, grind, and mix medicine powders, seeds and herbs mixtures. Effectively to reduce particle size into nice, smooth powder
Dimension: 8oz Glass Mortar and Pestle Set, portable and durable, reinforced heavy base, small but sturdy
Worry Free: We believe in the superior quality and beautiful design of our product. What you get: 1 high-quality 8 oz glass mortar and pestle bowl, and our friendly customer service
reviews_5s: This is perfect and is great for creating my own pigment paste. Highly recommend! It's worth every penny!I was surprised at the size and quality of this product. It is first class.Perfect size for grinding garlic and other herbs. Smooth head makes for easy cleaning.Grinding metal powderI love this mortar, easy to clean and useUsed to grind up boric acid to make ant killer. Mixed with powdered sugar and no more antsLove the glass, makes it ideal for cleaningGreat for crushing medsThis product is phenomenal and has great durability. I highly recommend this.I like it.
reviews_1s:
Poorly made product! Purchased in November and side of bowl broken by March. It was only used to crush allergy pills, once a month.The bowl portion (mortar) has near flat bottom with minimally rounded corners, and the grinding club (pestal) is round, making it
difficult to grind small material. Material stays in the corners. I expected a more rounded bottom to help feed material to the center of the bowl for better grinding.I haven’t had it for even a month and it broke while I was using it to grind up a soft tablet. Way too thin and fragile to actually use!Should be a "0" rating. Improper design for pulverizing medications. It is impossible to grind medication because of the interior design of this glass mortar. Ground pill "pieces" and fine powder end up in a "channel" along the inside perimeter. The pestle cannot make any contact with pill fragments or pill powder due to this design defect. It was a total waste of money and ended up in the trash.
